motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Immediate hover and focus feedback only.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default action for refresh, save, reset, and dry run.
components.css: .ds-btn { border: 1px solid #d8dee4; border-radius: 6px; background: #fbfcfe; color: #1f2328; font: 650 14px/1.45 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 12px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn:hover { border-color: #145c9e; color: #145c9e; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(20,92,158,.25); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: #145c9e; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive editorial action with explicit semantic color.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { border: 1px solid #d9b1b1; border-radius: 6px; background: #f7e7e7; color: #a32828; font: 650 14px/1.45 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 12px; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { border-color: #a32828; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(163,40,40,.22); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 5px; color: #626a73; font: 600 12px/1.3 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { border: 1px solid #d8dee4; border-radius: 6px; background: #fbfcfe; color: #1f2328; font: 400 14px/1.45 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 9px; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(20,92,158,.2); outline-offset: 1px; border-color: #145c9e; }

components.name: Count Pill
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-block; min-width: 24px; border-radius: 999px; background: #eef1f4; color: #1f2328; font: 400 14px/1.45 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 2px 7px; text-align: center; }

components.name: Report Row
components.html: Dry run report20 checked, 5 candidates
components.css: .ds-report-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8dee4; background: #fbfcfe; color: #1f2328; font: 400 14px/1.45 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-report-row:hover, .ds-report-row:focus-visible { background: #eef6ff; outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #145c9e; } .ds-report-row span { color: #626a73; }

narrative.overview: This system should feel like a dependable local utility used during focused editorial work. It is compact, restrained, and explicit: configuration is easy to scan, reports carry the visual priority, and irreversible actions never look casual. The interface uses familiar product controls, a light workspace suited to daytime desktop use, and a single blue accent reserved for focus and selection.

rules.name: The One Blue Voice Rule
rules.body: Control Blue is reserved for focus, selection, and primary interactive state. It must not become decoration.

rules.name: The Explicit Danger Rule
rules.body: Red appears only when the action is destructive or a failure requires attention.

rules.name: The Operational Type Rule
rules.body: Labels remain short and familiar. Technical identifiers may use monospace; ordinary instructions must not.

rules.name: The Flat Control Desk Rule
rules.body: No decorative shadows. A surface earns separation through role, tone, or a one-pixel border.

dos: Do preserve a restrained palette with Control Blue limited to interaction and selection.
Do place reports and current job state close to the actions they explain.
Do use one-pixel Structural Line borders and tonal surfaces instead of shadows.
Do keep every report selection and destructive action operable by keyboard.
Do keep technical detail available without forcing it into the primary path.
donts: Don't create colorful analytics dashboards or decorative SaaS cards.
Don't add marketing-style hero sections, excessive animation, or hidden controls.
Don't make destructive actions look casual or equivalent to ordinary settings changes.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradient text, or colored side-stripe borders.
Don't use pure black or pure white surfaces.
